trace.detail: IssueExtractor: Every route starts by converting source text into structured issue fields.
ScenarioClassifier: Scenario classification is required before retrieval decisions can be interpreted.
HistoricalRetriever: Earnings / Corporate Disclosure benefits from comparison against historical precedents.
ContextRetriever: Corporate disclosure detected without strong policy, supply chain, sanctions, or regulatory context terms.
ImplicationAnalyzer: Selected retrieval outputs need to be synthesized into analyst-facing considerations.
BriefGenerator: The final deliverable is an executive intelligence brief.

reasoning_record.why: Every route starts by converting source text into structured issue fields.
reasoning_record.expected_contribution: Core issue, actors, industries, policy terms, and document type.

reasoning_record.why: Scenario classification is required before retrieval decisions can be interpreted.
reasoning_record.expected_contribution: Primary scenario and matched keyword evidence.

reasoning_record.why: Earnings / Corporate Disclosure benefits from comparison against historical precedents.
reasoning_record.expected_contribution: Top analogue cases and similarity reasons from the historical database.

reasoning_record.why: Corporate disclosure detected without strong policy, supply chain, sanctions, or regulatory context terms.
reasoning_record.expected_contribution: Context retrieval is skipped to keep the route focused on disclosure interpretation.

reasoning_record.why: Selected retrieval outputs need to be synthesized into analyst-facing considerations.
reasoning_record.expected_contribution: Similarities, differences, business considerations, operational considerations, geopolitical considerations, and questions.

reasoning_record.why: The final deliverable is an executive intelligence brief.
reasoning_record.expected_contribution: Markdown brief with evidence sources, trace, and analysis path.
